responses:
theorem Topology.P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A : Set X) → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2] at hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P1]
  have h₁ : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) := by
    simpa using interior_subset (closure (interior A))
  exact subset_trans hP2 h₁

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (X := X) A → Topology.P1 (X := X) A := by
  intro h
  unfold Topology.P1 Topology.P2 at h ⊢
  exact subset_trans h (interior_subset (s := closure (interior A)))

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (X := X) A → Topology.P1 (X := X) A :=
by
  intro hP2
  exact Set.Subset.trans hP2 interior_subset
